zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine de Valognes Valensis於1126年出生在英國波克夏溫莎女爵 卡素時，她的父親Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham27歲，母親Helewise de Valenis16歲。她於1150年之前與Robert de Bermingham在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1175年在英國瓦維其可爾比米加姆享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine de Valognes Valensis于1126年出生在英国波克夏溫莎女爵 卡素时，她的父亲Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham27岁，母亲Helewise de Valenis16岁。她于1150年之前与Robert de Bermingham在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1175年在英国瓦維其可爾比米加姆享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine de Valognes Valensis was born in 1126, in Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England, her father, Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham, was 27 and her mother, Helewise de Valenis, was 16. She married Robert de Bermingham before 1150, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1175, in Birmingham, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine de Valognes Valensis est née en 1126, à Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Helewise de Valenis, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Bermingham avant 1150, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1175, à Birmingham, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine de Valognes Valensis 1126 in Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham 27 und ihre Mutter Helewise de Valenis 16. Sie hat vor 1150 in Irland Robert de Bermingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1175 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Birmingham, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine de Valognes Valensis è nata il nel 1126 nel Windsor Castle, Berkshire, England, sua padre, Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Helewise de Valenis, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Bermingham prima del 1150, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1175, nel Birmingham, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine de Valognes Valensisが1126年にイギリスバークシュアイアウィンドソル カストルで生まれた時，父Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parhamは27歳，母Helewise de Valenisは16歳であった。1150年以前にアイルランドでRobert de Berminghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1175年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアバーミンガムで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine de Valognes Valensis(이)가 1126년 영국 버크실르 윈드소르 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helewise de Valenis(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1150년 이전 아일랜드에서 Robert de Bermingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1175년 영국 워윅실르 비밍함에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine de Valognes Valensis nasceu em 1126, em Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Helewise de Valenis, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Bermingham antes 1150, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1175, em Birmingham, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine de Valognes Valensis родилась в 1126 г. в местности виндзор кастл, биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Helewise de Valenis, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Bermingham перед 1150 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1175 г. в местности бирмингхам, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine de Valognes Valensis nació en 1126, en Windsor Castle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Helewise de Valenis, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Robert de Bermingham antes de 1150, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1175, en Birmingham, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años.
